changes.summary: Preserve terminal pipelines and enforce explicit strict versus fallback teams.
changes.failure_evidence: On restart, saved status=done was discarded and the Control Center rendered shipped apps as idle, disabling feedback. The built-in team labeled So Grok contained Codex and Claude fallbacks; the revisor-cetico-de history ended L0/P0 on claude-frontend after Grok failures.
changes.root_cause: Engine recovery restored only non-terminal states, while team fallback semantics were implicit and labels did not constrain the configured fallback chain.
changes.targeted_fix: Restore all persisted pipeline states, convert interrupted running states to a recovery gate, add fallbackPolicy, make grok-solo strict including the prompt improver, and expose policy in the factory UI.

predicted_impact.rationale: The fix changes recovery and dispatch selection but leaves state format and fallback mode backward compatible.

changes.summary: Persist and replay structured per-run events in the Run Console.
changes.failure_evidence: The UI only displayed health and current job; SSE carried transient string logs and could not replay or filter the actual CLI phase by app/run/cursor.
changes.root_cause: There was no durable event contract between engine logging, SSE transport, CLI and Control Center.
changes.targeted_fix: Add sequenced redacted JSONL events, filtered SSE replay, CLI compatibility and a per-pipeline Run Console with progress and expandable output.

predicted_impact.rationale: The legacy log path remains as a compatibility fallback while engine events use the structured store.

changes.summary: Add Forge Operator intake/evolution and versioned Blueprint Studio contracts.
changes.failure_evidence: Ideas and long plans had to be transcribed manually, blueprints were listed without create/edit/archive semantics, and their relationship to profiles was not explained.
changes.root_cause: The control plane exposed pipeline.start but lacked a source-ingestion decision layer and immutable blueprint lifecycle.
changes.targeted_fix: Support text/file/folder/URL/PDF/DOCX intake, persist explainable triage, require review for self-modification/high stakes, and add content-addressed blueprint versions with derive/archive/restore/migrate actions.

predicted_impact.rationale: Legacy blueprints remain readable and the generic pipeline is inherited rather than duplicated.

changes.summary: Vendor Startup User Simulator and insert bounded pre-deploy simulation.
changes.failure_evidence: The pipeline moved from ship-check directly to deploy and had no repeatable five-customer evaluation or safe path from findings to one improvement cycle.
changes.root_cause: User simulation was an external manual activity, not a verified job with artifacts, limits or protected domains.
changes.targeted_fix: Pin the MIT skill, require five personas plus JSON/HTML and disclaimer, select only reversible high-confidence fixes, inject at most one ITERATE to B5 cycle, and expose a manual action for completed apps.

predicted_impact.rationale: Protected domains are fail-closed and deploy remains a human gate after simulation and verification.

results: npm test: 190 total, 189 pass, 0 fail, 1 skip
npm run typecheck: exit 0 across all workspaces with scripts
startup simulator vendored generator smoke: pass
manual simulator engine flow: SIMULATE -> ITERATE -> B5 -> deploy gate with exactly one ITERATE
